title: BareBones Optimization
description: the only mod you need if you wanna play like how drdonut says
body:
Barebones Optimization is a lightweight Minecraft modpack built for players who want the smoothest experience possible without changing the core gameplay. Designed around simplicity and performance, this pack includes only a handful of essential optimization mods — no fancy extras, no unnecessary clutter, just pure, stable Minecraft that runs fast on any system.

With around six carefully chosen mods, Barebones Optimization enhances FPS, reduces stutter, and shortens loading times while keeping the game fully vanilla-compatible. Every included mod has been tested for stability and efficiency, ensuring that you get the cleanest experience possible. You’ll notice faster chunk loading, better rendering performance, and smoother gameplay even in demanding worlds.

This modpack is perfect for players who want a minimal setup for building, survival, or servers without sacrificing speed or reliability. It’s ideal for laptop users, lower-end PCs, or anyone who values a crisp, lag-free Minecraft session.

Barebones Optimization doesn’t aim to change Minecraft — it refines it. Simple, stable, and fast, it delivers the best version of vanilla with zero distractions. Just install, play, and enjoy Minecraft as it was meant to be — optimized, clean, and lightning quick.
